arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Everton host in-form Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday at Goodison Park. The home side will be looking to build upon their hard-fought goalless draw at Arsenal last weekend. Dwight McNeil is ‘touch-and-go’ for the clash after he missed the draw against Arsenal with a knee injury. There is some positive news for Sean […] The post Everton vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: I regret leaving Chelsea to join Arsenal - I wanted to leave after three months
arts.sum: Willian has admitted that he wanted to leave Arsenal after just three months under Mikel Arteta. For me, it’s unfair to stay in a place that you don’t want to stay just because of the money.

arts.ttl: 'I was really upset': Pedro Neto shares the Chelsea match that left him so disappointed this season
arts.sum: 'I just want to enjoy my football.'

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk angers Chelsea fans with Usyk vs Fury actions
arts.sum: Mykhailo Mudryk has angered Chelsea fans further after he flew to Saudi Arabia to watch Tyson Fury’s fight against Oleksandr Usyk on Saturday. A statement from Chelsea on Tuesday read: "Chelsea Football Club can confirm the Football Association recently contacted our player Mykhailo Mudryk concerning an adverse finding in a routine urine test.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 'target' £41m transfer as Axel Disasi 'makes decision' about his future
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham are among the clubs targeting £41m Feyenoord defender David Hancko, according to reports. Elsewhere, while rumours surrounding defensive reinforcements intensify, current Chelsea star Axel Disasi has been linked with a move away from the club in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea Preview: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Second-placed Chelsea travel to Goodison Park to face an Everton side battling near the foot of the Premier League table on Sunday, December 22nd at 14:00 GMT. Everton vs Chelsea Form Everton cur...

arts.ttl: Why isn't Everton v Chelsea on TV today and how to watch
arts.sum: Everton welcome Chelsea to Goodison Park in the Premier League this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea are now interested in signing £55m attacker who has become dispensable to his club
arts.sum: His contract is set to expire.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Chelsea Premier League score prediction with huge title race impact
arts.sum: The last meeting between Chelsea and Everton saw Cole Palmer score four in a 6-0 win at Stamford Bridge, though the Blues did lose the reverse fixture 2-0 at Goodison Park. We predict that the Blues could line up in a 4-2-3-1 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Sanchez; Gusto, Tosin, Colwill, Veiga; Caicedo, Enzo; Neto, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now want to sign teenage midfielder Ruben Amorim insists is 'very talented'
arts.sum: One of their rivals also want him.
